characters.name: Audrey James
characters.description: Audrey JamesBiographical InformationStatusAliveAlias(es)JamesyOccupationFirefighterInmate firefighter(formerly)MusicianRelationshipsAffiliationCal FireStation 42(formerly)Station 58RelativesUnnamed motherUnnamed fatherAppearancesActorLeven RambinFirst AppearanceFiring SquadLast AppearanceLike a Wounded Wildebeest Audrey Peaches James[1]is a gritty and tenacious firefighter probie who earns her spot atStation 42alongsideBode, whom she also develops a romantic relationship with, though with the two of them dealing in their own sobrieties, she decides it would be best if they break up and she transfer to station 58. Audrey is a North Carolina transplant by way of Coachella Valley.[2]Growing up, she didn't have much, having grown up in a trailer park.[1]Her Christmas presents were socks and a trip to the bingo hall, where her parents later abandoned her. What she didn't have, she took and stole, along with indulging in various drugs, which ultimately resulted in her getting locked up and subsequently enlisting in the prison release firefighting program.[3]

characters.name: Brett Richards
characters.description: Brett RichardsBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationBattalion Fire ChiefRelationshipsAffiliationCal FireRelativesUnnamed wife †Unnamed daughterAppearancesActorShawn HatosyFirst AppearanceGoodbye for Now Battalian Chief Brett Richardsis a veteran firefighter who temporarily assumes the role ofStation 42's new Battalion Chief in the wake ofVince's death to determine the fate of the station. He was born in Boston, and in 1995, he moved to California, where he joined Cal Fire. While at the academy, he metVince Leone, who disliked him for unknown reasons. Over the years, he gained a mentor, whom he later married, and had a daughter as he rose through the ranks. In 2018, he lost his wife in a Structure Fire in Clearlake Oaks. His response to her death was to stay at their firehouse and hold on to their old life as long as he could, whereas his daughter left town and moved to Edgewater. Since then, he had been sent to various firehouses to help fix them.

characters.name: Camden Casey
characters.description: Camden CaseyBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationFirefighterTraining captainRelationshipsAffiliationCal FireRelativesPatrick Casey †(brother)AppearancesActorJared PadaleckiFirst AppearanceEdgewater's About to Get Real Cozy Camden Caseyis a SoCal firefighter and training captain who arrives inEdgewaterfor cadet training and immediately recognizesBode's raw talent. Camden led his crew, including his younger brother Patrick, into the Bigleaf Valley Fire, in which all nine of them perished in the flames, with him being the only survivor after listening to his superior's orders rather than trusting his gut.[1][2]

characters.name: Camille Thurston
characters.description: Camille ThurstonBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationEmergency PhysicianRelationshipsAffiliationEdgewater Memorial HospitalAppearancesActorNatalie ZeaFirst AppearanceWhy Not Now? Dr. Camille Thurstonis a Emergency Physician who works part-time at the rodeo. She is first introduced as a Emergency Medicine Physician who is working in the rodeo with Manny. Before meeting him, she was one of the picks for a date on the same dating app that he was on. After a brief encounter with the man, she unmatched with him, something that surprised him. She then re-matched him and they began to date. Their relationship becomes rocky whenRobertashows up.

characters.name: Chloe Mackenzie
characters.description: Chloe MackenzieBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationMath teacherRelationshipsAffiliationEdgewater High SchoolRelativesTyler Mackenzie(son)Unnamed ex-husband †AppearancesActorAlona TalFirst AppearanceFresh Start Chloe Mackenzieis a former classmate ofBode's andTyler Mackenzie's mom. Chloe was raised inEdgewater, where she attended high school withBode Leone,Jake Crawford,Cara Maisonette,Rick Stenglerand Buck Benson. While in school, she had been assigned as a math tutor to Bode, whom she had a crush on. After graduating high school, she went on to college and became a high school math teacher. She also married and was widowed with a son, Tyler.

characters.name: Cole Rodman
characters.description: Cole RodmanBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationInmate firefighterMMA fighter(formerly)RelationshipsRelativesVivian †(mother)Unnamed fatherUnnamed wifeFour unnamed daughtersLogan Rodman(son)AppearancesActorTye WhiteFirst AppearanceSomething's Coming Cole Rodmanis a former MMA fighter turned family man, who is now a prison inmate andBode's cellmate. Cole has fortunately learned from the mistakes of his past and is becoming a better man.[1] Cole later receives the news he has been paroled, but the night before his release, the Zabel Ridge Fire hitsThree Rock Con Camp. Although Eve tries to get Cole to stay safe as he's about to go home to his family, Cole chooses to fight the fire alongside everyone else, coming up with the idea to use a bucket brigade. However, their efforts are in vain and Three Rock is destroyed, although everyone evacuates safely. Although devastated by the loss of the camp, everyone finds some joy in the fact that since midnight has passed, Cole is now officially a free man.

characters.name: Collin O'Reilly
characters.description: Alex ShawcrossBiographical InformationStatusIncarceratedAlias(es)Collin O'ReillyOccupationFirefighterRelationshipsAffiliationCal FireAppearancesActorZach TinkerFirst AppearanceTwo Pink LinesLast AppearanceA Cry for Help Alex Shawcross(also known asCollin O'Reilly) was first introduced as a humble, charming, and talented probie firefighter. The son of a legendary firefighting hero, Collin holds a name that he's constantly trying to live up to. He grew up in the shadow of his fire-fighting father, causing him to spend most of his twenties rebelling against expectations. However it is later revealed to be false. Collin is partnered withGabrieladuring his first day on the job. They climb the cliff to better assess the weather pattern, at which point, Collin inquires aboutBodeand the crime he committed to get locked up, but Gabriela comes to Bode's defense, revealing that herdadwas an inmate before becoming captain atThree Rockand that people can change. Collin then mistakenly steps on a rock, sending a large bolder off the cliff, which narrowly missesFreddydue to Bode intervening. Gabriela ultimately covers for him, as it's his first day, but Collin later comes clean.[1]

characters.name: Diego Moreno
characters.description: Diego MorenoBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationFirefighterParamedicCombat Veteran(formerly)RelationshipsAffiliationCal FireRelativesUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherAppearancesActorRafael de la FuenteFirst AppearanceSomething's Coming Diego Morenois a charming and motivated paramedic, firefighter, and combat vet who served in Afghanistan. Now inEdgewater, he will be trainingGabrielafor her paramedic certification.[1] Not much has so far been revealed about his past other than that he has a large family, something Gabriela likes. They met when she began training as a paramedic. At some point they began dating and on their anniversary, they both proposed marriage to each other.

characters.name: Ellis Monroe
characters.description: Ellis MonroeBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedOccupationSerial KillerSecurity guardRetired Sheriff's deputyCause of DeathShot in the head byMickey FoxRelationshipsAffiliationEdgewater County Sheriff's Office(formerly)AppearancesActorTim GuineeFirst AppearanceShow of ForceLast AppearanceThe Lost Girls of Edgewater County Ellis Monroewas a Sheriff's deputy with the Edgewater County Sheriff's Office as well as a serial killer known asthe Blood Moon Killer. Not much is known of his childhood. He began working for theEdgewater County Sheriff's Officeas a deputy where he had a record for bullying and excessive use of force. When Ellis came across a young woman namedDanain an abandoned home, he abducted her as his first victim and brainwashed Dana into thinking that he had saved her. Dana eventually turned from Ellis' victim to his accomplice. He then proceeded to use her to help him kidnap girls over time. Ellis tried to take Romy Hale, which was thwarted by her mother calling while the girl was in the car, forcing Ellis to bring her home. Romy's mother filed a complaint, and he was forced to retire, but Romy suspected that some day she would be approached about Ellis killing someone.

characters.name: Eric Pittman
characters.description: Eric PittmanBiographical InformationStatusAliveAppearancesActorJoe DelfinFirst AppearanceThe AftermathLast AppearancePlus One Eric Pittmanis a former drug addict who was withZoey Campbellon the night that she was abducted by theBlue Moon Killer. Eric, a drug addict at the time, attended a party where he metZoey Campbell. Eric took Zoey to the yearly Blue Moon Festival where she ditched him after the effigy was burned. That night, Zoey vanished and was never seen again. As he had a warrant out for his arrest, Eric didn't come forward as a witness despite being one of the last people to see Zoey. As a result, no one knew that Zoey had been at the Blue Moon Festival.

characters.name: Erika Snow
characters.description: Erika SnowBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationFirefighterAssistant ChiefRelationshipsAffiliationCal FireAppearancesActorCrystal BalintFirst AppearanceNo Good Deed Erika Snowis an Assistant Chief that came toEdgewaterto conduct an internal investigation following the incident on Ledgewood Bridge. Erika arrives inEdgewaterto investigate the Ledgewood incident, in whichBodefell into the lake after rescuing akidtrapped inside a car, andGabrieladove in after him. This led the two of them to the hit-and-run driver,Meg, who fled the scene after the incident. The three of them, now stranded in the wilderness together, search for the road while also providing medical aid for Meg, who injured her leg. Unaware that Meg was also suffering from internal bleeding, she died soon thereafter, resulting in her parents filing a lawsuit.

characters.name: Faye Stone
characters.description: Faye StoneBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationFirefighterFounder and CEO of Nozzle Fire SuppressionRelationshipsAffiliationNozzle Fire SuppressionAppearancesActorRebecca MaderFirst AppearanceOff the Rails Faye Stoneis the founder and CEO of Nozzle Fire Suppression who had a brief fling withManny Perez. Faye meetsMannywhile attending a Gamblers Anonymous meeting after hearing him speak of his job as a firefighter. Impressed, she offers him a job at her concierge fire fighting company. While he declines the offer, he retains her card, which he later uses to acquire her help for a train crash.[1]

characters.description: Felix LonneganBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationInmate firefighterRelationshipsAffiliationCal FireThree Rock Con CampAppearancesActorMark KryskoFirst AppearanceHappy to Help Felix Lonneganis an inmate atThree Rock Con Camp. Lonnegan andBeckget involved withSleeper, who promises them drugs and favors in exchange for their loyalty. They express this by attackingBodeat Sleeper's behest.[1]

characters.name: Fred Watkins
characters.description: Fred WatkinsBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedOccupationSheriffCause of DeathShot by Andy KubiakRelationshipsAffiliationEdgewater County Sheriff's OfficeRelativesUnnamed wifeAppearancesActorMichael St. John SmithFirst AppearanceAlert the Sheriff Fred Watkinswas the Sheriff with the Edgewater County Sheriff's Office. Fred was the sheriff of Edgewater for over 20 years. However, according toGina, he had a habit of ignoring things that didn't fit with his vision of a perfect little town. He also had Punch and the Rotary Club on speed dial and would often bend to their wishes. During his tenure,a serial killerhunted the Blood Moon Festival undetected.[1]
